description: Checkmarx provides application security products for scanning source code, open source dependencies, infrastructure as code, secrets, APIs, and related software risk. Its Checkmarx One platform centralizes these AppSec capabilities for enterprise development and security workflows.
summary: Checkmarx exposes documented REST APIs for Checkmarx One and SCA, a Checkmarx One CLI, and markets an MCP server; developer auth is via Checkmarx-issued API keys or OAuth clients, while MCP connection details were not publicly documented.
